interfaces.name: getHomepageOverview
interfaces.description: Get high-level content for the homepage, including featured services, projects, resources, and tools.

interfaces.name: getServicesOverview
interfaces.description: List all consulting service categories with brief descriptions for the Services Overview page.

interfaces.name: getSlopeStabilityServicePage
interfaces.description: Get content for the Slope Stability & Retaining Walls service page, including related case studies and resources.

interfaces.name: getSubsurfaceInvestigationServicePage
interfaces.description: Get content for the Subsurface Investigation service page, including capabilities and initial packages list.

interfaces.name: getInvestigationPackagesFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the investigation packages (project types and price range).

interfaces.name: getInvestigationPackages
interfaces.description: List subsurface investigation packages filtered by project type and price for the Packages & Pricing section.

parameters.name: maxPrice
parameters.description: Optional maximum package price in USD.

parameters.name: minPrice
parameters.description: Optional minimum package price in USD.

interfaces.name: getInvestigationPackageDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single investigation package for the package detail page.

interfaces.name: saveInvestigationPackageToPlan
interfaces.description: Select an investigation package and save it to a named project plan in My Plans.

interfaces.name: getQuoteFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get dropdown options and default selections for the quote request form.

parameters.name: preferredServiceType
parameters.description: Optional service type to preselect, e.g., 'slope_stability_embankments', 'subsurface_investigation'.

interfaces.name: getServiceLevelOptions
interfaces.description: Get service level options, descriptions, and prices for a given service type in the quote form.

parameters.name: maxBudgetUsd
parameters.description: Optional max budget to filter out more expensive service levels.

interfaces.name: submitQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a completed quote request form for geotechnical consulting services.

parameters.name: anticipatedConstructionStartDate
parameters.description: Anticipated construction start date in ISO 8601 format, e.g., '2025-06-15'.

interfaces.name: getProjectsFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Projects & Case Studies listing page.

interfaces.name: getProjects
interfaces.description: Search and list project case studies with filtering and sorting for the Projects & Case Studies page.

minProjectValueUsd.description: Optional minimum project value in USD.

maxProjectValueUsd.description: Optional maximum project value in USD.

interfaces.name: getProjectCaseStudyDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single project case study, including related projects and services.

interfaces.name: getResourceFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Resources & Knowledge Center page.

interfaces.name: getResources
interfaces.description: List resources with filters and sorting for the Resources & Knowledge Center page.

publishedDateStart.description: Optional start date (inclusive) in ISO format, e.g., '2022-01-01'.

publishedDateEnd.description: Optional end date (inclusive) in ISO format.

isChecklist.description: Optional filter to only include checklist-type resources.

interfaces.name: getResourceDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single resource item, including related resources.

interfaces.name: downloadResourcePdf
interfaces.description: Initiate a PDF download for a resource and return metadata for the client to handle the file.

interfaces.name: getConsultationFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get meeting type, specialty, and project stage options for the Book a Consultation page.

interfaces.name: getConsultationAvailability
interfaces.description: Get available consultation time slots for a specific date, meeting type, and specialty.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date for which to list available slots in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

interfaces.name: bookConsultation
interfaces.description: Create a consultation booking from a selected availability slot and client details.

interfaces.name: getToolsOverview
interfaces.description: Get a list of available tools and calculators with descriptions for the Tools overview page.

interfaces.name: getBearingCapacityCalculatorConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration and options for the Bearing Capacity Calculator page.

interfaces.name: calculateBearingCapacity
interfaces.description: Run a bearing capacity calculation based on the provided inputs and return computed capacities.

interfaces.name: saveBearingCapacityResult
interfaces.description: Save a previously computed bearing capacity calculation under a named project in My Plans.

interfaces.name: getTeamFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Our Team directory page.

interfaces.name: getTeamMembers
interfaces.description: List team members with filters and optional skill keyword search for the Our Team directory.

minYearsOfExperience.description: Optional minimum years of experience filter.

hasSkillKeyword.description: Optional keyword to match in keySkills, e.g., 'slope stability'.

isAvailableForProjects.description: If true, only include team members available for projects.

interfaces.name: getTeamMemberDetail
interfaces.description: Get full profile information for a team member, including key skills and related projects.

interfaces.name: addTeamMemberToShortlist
interfaces.description: Add a team member to the current project team shortlist.

interfaces.name: getProjectTeamShortlist
interfaces.description: Get the current project team shortlist, including team member details, for quick access (e.g., header or sidebar).

interfaces.name: getMyPlansOverview
interfaces.description: Get all saved investigation plans, bearing capacity results, and project team shortlist items for the My Plans & Project Team page.

interfaces.name: updateSavedInvestigationPlanName
interfaces.description: Rename a saved investigation package plan in My Plans.

interfaces.name: removeSavedInvestigationPlan
interfaces.description: Remove a saved investigation package plan from My Plans.

interfaces.name: removeSavedCalculationResult
interfaces.description: Remove a saved bearing capacity calculation result from My Plans.

interfaces.name: removeShortlistedTeamMember
interfaces.description: Remove a team member from the project team shortlist.

interfaces.name: subscribeToNewsletter
interfaces.description: Subscribe an email address to the firm's newsletter with specified topics and email frequency.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About Us page, including mission, history, regions served, sectors, and core competencies.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateBearingCapacityInternal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute bearing capacity values and notes based on soil type, geometry, factor of safety, and method.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateMyPlansStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the single-user store for saved plans, calculation results, and shortlist items.

helperFunctions.name: _mapEnumToDisplayLabel
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to map enum values (e.g., sector, foundation_type, serviceType) to user-friendly labels for UI display.

helperFunctions.name: _filterAndSortEntities
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply common filter and sort logic to entity collections (projects, resources, team members).
